title: General Knowledge Night
description: A mixed warm-up round covering science, history, music, and sport.

questions.prompt: Which planet in our solar system is known as the Red Planet?
questions.hint: Its name comes from the Roman god of war.
It can be upright or grand.

questions.prompt: In which sport would you perform a slam dunk?
questions.hint: It is played with a hoop and backboard.
He was also an inventor and scientist.

questions.prompt: What gas do plants absorb from the atmosphere?
Which ocean lies between Africa, Asia, and Australia?
